ol.li: User should be able the see calendar in multiple views like Weekly, Monthly, Yearly
User should be able to see the events created for a day in Weekly, Monthly view arranged by start time
User should be able to create new events, delete/modify old events
User should be able to select start/end date/time and should be able to invite other user in a event
